title: Loyal Hoe
description: A mod that allows you to put Loyality enchants on a netherite hoe.
body:
# Loyal Hoe
**You now can enchant a Netherite Hoe with Loyality and finally get a loyal hoe.**

![Anvil Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30eb157b09d11acd76993df4f0086425d05227cf.png)

The enchantments Loyality I, Loyality II and Loyality III let the hoe fly to you when you drop it. The speed varies between I the slowest and III the fastest flying. 
If you die the hoe drops two blocks in front of you on respawn so you will never lose it.

_First mod ever created so feel free to ask for any changes._
